<script>
function closeAd(position) {
    const el = document.getElementById(`ad-${position}`);
    if (el) el.classList.add('hide');
}

function rotateAds(position, interval = 5000) {
    const container = document.querySelector(`#${position}-rotator`);
    if (!container) return;
    const items = container.querySelectorAll('.ad-item');
    let index = 0;

    if (items.length <= 1) {
        items[0]?.classList.add('active');
        return;
    }

    items[index].classList.add('active');

    setInterval(() => {
        items[index].classList.remove('active');
        index = (index + 1) % items.length;
        items[index].classList.add('active');
    }, interval);
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    ['footer', 'header', 'sidebar'].forEach(pos => {
        const el = document.getElementById(`ad-${pos}`);
        if (el) {
            setTimeout(() => el.classList.remove('hide'), 100);
            rotateAds(pos);
        }
    });
});
</script>

<script>
$(document).ready(function(){
    const owl = $(".trending-carousel").owlCarousel({
        loop: true,
        margin: 10,
        autoplay: true,
        autoplayTimeout: 4000,
        smartSpeed: 700,
        responsive: { 0:{items:1},576:{items:2},992:{items:3} }
    });
    $('.carousel-nav-prev').click(() => owl.trigger('prev.owl.carousel'));
    $('.carousel-nav-next').click(() => owl.trigger('next.owl.carousel'));
});

function updateClock() {
    const now = new Date();
    const time = now.toLocaleTimeString();
    const date = now.toLocaleDateString(undefined, { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' });

    document.getElementById("live-clock").textContent = time;
    document.getElementById("live-clock-mobile").textContent = time;
    document.getElementById("current-date-mobile").textContent = date;
}
setInterval(updateClock, 1000);
updateClock();
</script>

    }
  });

  // Your custom navigation buttons
  $('.news-prev').click(() => owl.trigger('prev.owl.carousel'));
  $('.news-next').click(() => owl.trigger('next.owl.carousel'));
});

<!-- 📅 Flatpickr Date Picker -->
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/flatpickr"></script>
<script>
flatpickr("#datePicker", {
  dateFormat: "Y-m-d",
  maxDate: "today",
  disableMobile: true,
  onChange: function(selectedDates, dateStr) {
    if (!dateStr) return;
    document.getElementById("dateStatus").textContent = "⏳ Checking...";

    const encodedDate = encodeURIComponent(dateStr);

    fetch("?ajax=check_datetime&date=" + encodedDate)
      .then(res => res.json())
      .then(data => {
        if (data.success && data.file_id) {
          // ✅ Redirect when success
          window.location.href = "epaper.php?file_id=" + data.file_id + "&date=" + encodedDate;
        } else {
          document.getElementById("dateStatus").textContent = "⚠️ No edition found for selected date.";
        }
      })
      .catch(err => {
        document.getElementById("dateStatus").textContent = "❌ Error checking the date.";
        console.error(err);
      });
  }
});
</script>

<script>
  const isRestrictedDevice = /Android|webOS|iPhone|iPad|iPod|BlackBerry|Windows Phone/i.test(navigator.userAgent) || window.innerWidth <= 1024;

  // Utility: allow all buttons, links, and toggles (hamburger etc.)
  function isSafeElement(el) {
    return el.closest('button, a, input, textarea, select, label, .navbar-toggler, .share-btn, .btn');
  }

  // Block context menu
  document.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
  });

  // Restrict copy only on restricted devices
  document.addEventListener('copy', (e) => {
    if (isRestrictedDevice && !isSafeElement(e.target)) {
      e.preventDefault();
      alert("Copying is disabled on this page.");
    }
  });

  // Restrict text selection
  document.addEventListener('selectstart', (e) => {
    if (isRestrictedDevice && !isSafeElement(e.target)) {
      e.preventDefault();
    }
  });

  // Block long-press on mobile (like copy/share popup)
  if (isRestrictedDevice) {
    let touchTimer = null;

    document.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
      if (!isSafeElement(e.target)) {
        touchTimer = setTimeout(() => {
          e.preventDefault();
        }, 500);
      }
    }, { passive: false });

    document.addEventListener('touchend', () => {
      clearTimeout(touchTimer);
    });
  }
</script>

}

    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

    background-color: #f0f0f0;
    border-radius: 50%;
}
/* Ensure Back to Top button overlaps sticky social icons */
.back-to-top {
    z-index: 10000; /* higher than #sticky-social-icons (which is 9999) */
    position: fixed;
    right: 15px;
    bottom: 70px; /* leave room above the sticky icons bar */
}

    }
}

<script>
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    const sticky = document.getElementById("sticky-social-icons");
    const footer = document.querySelector(".container-fluid.py-4.px-sm-3.px-md-5");

    if (window.innerWidth <= 768 && sticky && footer) {
      const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
        ([entry]) => {
          if (entry.isIntersecting) {
            sticky.style.display = "none";
          } else {
            sticky.style.display = "flex";
          }
        },
        {
          root: null,
          threshold: 0,
        }
      );

      observer.observe(footer);
    }
  });
</script>
